status_message: Add the replacement API key to enable the next news refresh.
policy: News only. Model changes require owner approval.

items.headline: Private-market indicator moved above the approved reference price
items.summary: The latest secondary-market indication is above the model reference. It is informative but does not change the approved valuation distribution.

items.headline: New growth capital supports the 200 MW expansion target
items.summary: A new financing supports inference capacity expansion. The transaction did not disclose a valuation, so the approved capacity-driven model remains unchanged.

items.headline: Mission execution supports the existing operating case
items.summary: A completed mission and continuing platform development support the positive execution scenario without providing enough evidence for a valuation change.
